title: 毎日杯の後に・次は……え？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru makes it through the Mainichi
Hai.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once again, our next goal race is left to fate! And
the gods decree that our next race is... the
formidable Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she has some gripes with the outcome,
Matikanefukukitaru accepts her destiny. In order
to claim victory in the Japanese Derby, she... runs
off to improve her luck at a shrine.
